summary: Completed comprehensive responsive design testing for MatchMe app. All responsive features successfully implemented and working correctly across mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px) viewports.
passed_tests: Landing page - desktop full-width hero with photo on right
Landing page - 3-column feature cards on desktop, stacked on mobile
Auth page - centered card layout across all viewport sizes
Pricing page - 3-column pricing cards on desktop, stacked on mobile/tablet
Button interactions - all CTA buttons working correctly
CSS implementation - proper Tailwind responsive classes and custom layouts
Navigation flows - all page transitions working correctly
Typography and spacing - responsive across all viewport sizes
